Correct answer: B
Solution

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Q4 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A cylindrical roller bearing is subjected to a radial load of 35 kN. The dynamic load bearing capacity of the bearing is 70 kN, the designed life for 90% of bearings will be ___________ million revolutions.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q5 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A fillet-welded joint is subjected to transverse load F as shown in figure. Both legs of the fillets are 10 mm size. If allowable shear stress of the weld is 50 MPa, considering the minimum throat area of weld, the maximum allowable transverse load per unit width of plate will be ___ N/m.

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Each is subjected to one of the maximum-minimum stress cycles listed below, the frequency is the same for all three tests. If the fatigue life of the specimens is denoted by NA, NB and NC, the identify the correct option from the below statements.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Two shafts are connected by means of a flange coupling to transmit torque of 25 N-m. The flanges of coupling are fastened by ‘n’ bolts of same material at a radius of 25 mm. If allowable shear stress for bolt material is 300 MPa and size of the minimum value of n is

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Q8 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A rail wagon of mass 20 tonnes is moving with a velocity of 50 km/h. It brought to rest by two buffers with helical springs of 300 mm mean diameter. The maximum torque developed in the spring wire will be ________ kN-m. If modulus of rigidity is 80 GPa and diameter of wire is 60 mm and number of active turns of spring coil is 10.

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A short shoe brake is shown in figure. The diameter of drum is 200 mm. If the operating force of 700 N is applied at the end of a lever and the coefficient of friction between drum and shoe is 0.25. The braking torque is _______ N-m. (Correct upto two decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 35 (35 - 35)
Solution

35 (35 - 35)

Q11 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A square journal bearing for a centrifugal pump has the following data: Load on the journal = 20 kN, speed of the journal = absolute viscosity at operating
temperature = 0.002 Pa-s, maximum bearing pressure for the journal = 2 MPa, clearance = 0.05 mm. The frictional torque will be ________ N-m.

(Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.6 (0.55 - 0.65)
Solution

0.6 (0.55 - 0.65)

Q12 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A straight teeth spur gear is to transmit 20 kW when it rotates at 40 rev/s. The allowable static stresses for the gear is 120 MPa. The gear has 15 teeth and its face width is 15 times the module, if the tooth geometry form factor is 0.3. Then, its module will be ______ mm. (Rounded off to nearest integer) [Assume : = 1.2]

NAT
Correct answer: 6 (4 - 8)
Solution

6 (4 - 8)

NAT
Correct answer: 90 (90 - 90)
Solution

90 (90 - 90)

(Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 98174.77 (98174.5 - 98175.0)
Solution

98174.77 (98174.5 - 98175.0)

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

The length of shaft is 1.2 m and Syt = 400 MPa, FOS = 2, then the minimum diameter of shaft as per MDET (Von-Mises) will be ________ mm.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

The inner diameter of clutch is 150 mm.

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)

The strength of joint per pitch length in kN will be _______.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)

Q25 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A thin cylindrical pressure vessel of 500 mm diameter and 5 mm thickness is subjected to an internal pressure varying from 2 MPa to 10 MPa, Assume that yield, ultimate and endurance strength of material are 500 MPa, 1000 MPa and 400 MPa respectively. The factor of safety as per Goodman’s relation is ____________.

(Use Von-Mises theory). (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.44 (1.4 - 1.5)
Solution

1.44 (1.4 - 1.5)

 

Q26 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A shaft to be designed on the basis of torsional strength and rigidity. The allowable shear stress is 60 MPa and maximum allowable twist is 0.02°/m. If G = 80 GPa, then the minimum diameter of shaft will be _____ mm. (Correct upto one decimal place)

NAT
Correct answer: 4.3 (4.2 - 4.4)
Solution

4.3 (4.2 - 4.4)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0

A block brake consists of a simple block which is pressed against the rotating drum by means of a lever as shown. The drum is rotating at 1000 rpm and coefficient of friction between drum and block is 0.3. If the drum has to stop within 10 sec, then minimum applied upward load at end of lever will be ________ N.

(Correct upto two decimal places)

The mass of drum is 100 kg and the radius of gyration is 0.15 m.

NAT
Correct answer: 176.71 (175 - 177)
Solution

176.71 (175 - 177)

Q28 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A cantilever beam made of cold drawn steel (Sut = 600 MPa and Syt = 380 MPa) is shown in figure. The corrected endurance limit stress of beam is 270 MPa. The load P acting at the free end varies from –50 kN to +150 kN. The diameter d of the beam using soderberg criteria if factor of safety is 2, will be _______ mm.

(Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 320 (318 - 322)
Solution

320 (318 - 322)

Q29 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A rotating steel bar with ultimate strength Sut = 600 MPa is subjected to a completely reversed bending stress. The corrected endurance limit of the bar is 300 MPa. The percentage change in the fatigue strength of bar if life is changed from 50000 cycle to 90000 cycle will be ___________. Assume fatigue strength corresponding to 1000 cycle as 0.9 Sut.

NAT
Correct answer: -4.9 (-5.5 - -4.4)
Solution

-4.9 (-5.5 - -4.4)

Q30 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A spur pinion rotating at 100/ rev/s drives spur gear at a transmission ratio of 4. The pinion has 30 teeth of 8 mm module. The face width of both gears is 100 mm. The permissible static bending stress for pinion is 80 MPa. The velocity factor and the form factor for pinion is to be taken as 0.8 and 0.4 respectively. The maximum power transmitted by pinion will be _________ kW. (Assume factor of safety as 2.56) (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 240 (235 - 245)
Solution

240 (235 - 245)

Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A six-shoe centrifugal clutch is used to transmit 50 kW at 3000/π rpm. Inner diameter of the drum is 600 mm and the centre of mass of each shoe is 240 mm from axis of rotation. Coefficient of friction between friction lining and drum is 0.25. If the engagement is at 80% of the full speed, the mass of each shoe will be ______ kg. (Correct upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.30 (1.20 - 1.30)
Solution

1.30 (1.20 - 1.30)

Q32 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A load of 2000 N is supported by a journal bearing of 50 mm diameter and 50 mm length. The radial clearance is 0.025 mm and bearing is lubricated by an oil of 0.02 Pa-s viscosity at operating temperature. The bearing is capable of dissipating 50 watts by heat transfer, then which of the following statement(s) is/are correct?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, c)

Assume for steel endurance limit of a rotating beam subjected to reversed bending
Which of the following statement(s) is/are CORRECT?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, c)
